footer.bio: The ultimate high-performance hardware catalog. Build your setup, save your favorites, and dominate the game.

favorites.subtitle: Your custom build saved locally
favorites.emptySubtitle: You haven't saved any components to your watchlist yet. Explore the catalog to start building your setup.

404.p1: Sorry, we couldn't find what you were looking for. The item may not exist, or the URL might be incorrect.

contact.title: START A
contact.subtitle: Did you find an error in a technical sheet? Do you want to suggest a new component for the library? We're here to listen to the community.
contact.successMsg: We've received your message. A NEXUS administrator will review your request shortly.
contact.disclaimer: NEXUS is a React learning project (BACINSTU Project). We do not process direct sales, commercial warranties, or product shipments. Everything is fake. :D

about.title: About Us
about.mainDesc: At NEXUS, we don't sell components; we collect, analyze, and catalog the most accurate technical information to help you design the perfect setup.
about.missionP1: NEXUS was born from the need for a centralized and reliable place to consult real technical specifications. Often, crucial information is hidden behind misleading marketing on manufacturer websites.
about.missionP2: Our goal is to build the largest digital archive of enthusiast-grade hardware. A space designed for creators, gamers, and professionals, where they can compare technologies, save their favorite lists, and plan their next technological leap with real data.
about.pillar1Desc: We separate marketing noise from facts. Our technical specs reflect the true capabilities of each hardware piece, without commercial bias.
about.pillar2Desc: Use our favorites system to save the parts you're interested in and compare them easily to make the best decision.
about.pillar3Desc: Developed as a free tool (BACINSTU V1.0 Project) so any PC Master Race enthusiast has quick access to information.
